changes.reason: STALE_0DTE breakout fallback is low efficiency: 2 trades, only $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. Lowering the adaptive cap from 6 to the grid value 4 tests faster realization without touching VALID_0DTE profiles.

The stale breakout fallback is being paid with long-hold low-dollar recoveries. Reducing fixed TP from 3 to the grid value 2.5 should shorten stale-data exposure while preserving the ES-only fallback role.

Keep stale/no-0DTE breakout entries only when ES trend slope is stronger. Current 0.08 is already selective; testing the grid's 0.10 is a narrow quality bump aimed at stale breakout MAE/exposure, not broad global pruning.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should improve fallback PnL per exposure hour and reduce stale breakout hold/MAE drag while leaving VALID_0DTE option-confirmed profiles unchanged. Tradeoff is a small risk of losing the two profitable stale breakout fallback trades; reject if no-0DTE fallback PnL turns negative or total net profit retention falls below 98% of run_044.
recommendation.label: stale-no-0dte-breakout-efficiency-trim
recommendation.rationale: Use batch_g_missing_0dte_policy_adapted and isolate the weakest data-state sleeve. run_044 is the score leader, but the stale breakout fallback is inefficient versus the core book: VALID_0DTE earns $5847.3, while STALE_0DTE adds only $162.8 across 5 trades. The breakout_long_no_0dte stale subset has the worst fallback tail and longest median hold, so this is a profile-specific stale-state efficiency test rather than another global veto or option-profile tightening run.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: breakout_long_no_0dte in STALE_0DTE produced 2 trades, $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE, while the single EXPIRED_0DTE breakout fallback was high efficiency.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Stale No-0DTE Breakout Efficiency Trim
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Tiny sample; stricter slope and lower target may remove useful fallback insurance or underpay the one clean expired/no-0DTE breakout pattern.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE map stale or expired and router selects breakout_long_no_0dte as ES-only fallback.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Fallback PnL/exposure improves, fallback worst MAE does not worsen, VALID_0DTE PnL/trades are unchanged, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_044, and slow_12h stays 0.
